overview: New Jersey Regenerative Institute specializes in regenerative medicine and non-surgical orthopedic care for sports, spine, and orthopedic injuries, with focus on shoulder and knee. The practice uses regenerative approaches including PRP, ozone therapy, prolotherapy, shockwave, and orthobiologics to address root causes of pain and restore function.
highlights: Bone marrow aspirate concentrate and MFAT treatments
Regenerative medicine approaches (PRP, ozone therapy, prolotherapy, shockwave)
targetAudience: Individuals with sports, spine, or orthopedic injuries, particularly affecting the knee and shoulder, seeking non-surgical regenerative treatment options.
